final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing full-screen brand advertisement banner for a flagship smartphone launch, formatted as a mobile screenshot.

Style/medium: needs a high-impact brand-reveal aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be full-screen vertical layout optimized for mobile display, brand advertisement centered
Subject: must include a flagship smartphone as hero product, full-bleed visual-impact treatment
Scene/backdrop: needs a dramatic, immersive backdrop — exact environment is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a high-contrast, visually striking atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a bold, premium direction — exact hex values and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a sleek, high-tech surface treatment — exact finish is yours
Text (verbatim): must include "OPPO Find X9 Pro" (large, primary hero text), "OPPO" (wordmark/logo placement)
Constraints: must preserve 1080×1920 portrait aspect ratio; layout must read as a polished brand-exposure ad screenshot
Avoid:
